narrative: Tribal casino, 2,400 slot machines + 80 table games + online sportsbook. Self-excluded player permitted entry + accepted $4,200 wagers on 2026-04-12; winnings of $850 paid out — state regulatory violation. CTR aggregation threshold breached — patron deposited $4,800 + $4,500 + $4,200 across three windows in 14-hour gaming day (aggregate $13,500); CTRC not filed. Structuring indicator on second patron — six $1,800-$1,900 chip purchases over 9 hours; SAR-C threshold unfilled. Source of funds gap — patron with $84,000 cumulative deposits over 30 days has no SOF documentation. Match-fixing indicator on sportsbook — unusual late surge of $52K wagers on under in college basketball game; IBIA integrity alert raised but no market suspended. AML independent test overdue — last completed 18 months ago. Underage gambling — three patrons admitted ages 19-20 in 21+ section last quarter. UK component of operation: UKGC LCCP customer-interaction not triggered for patron with £6,200 monthly losses.
